body_txt: If the birthday of a character is included in a work, then it is either plot-relevant or significant for the character . Or both . In Real Life , people are born on random dates. In fiction, while it's possible for the creator to just choose a random date, if a character's date of birth is given (even if it's just in supplementary material ), then nine times out of ten, it has some sort of symbolic meaning . This can be a character obsessed with romance being born on February 14th , or an unlucky character being born on Friday the 13th . The meaning can also be ironic, such as a bright and cheerful character being born on October 31st . It can also, owing to When the Planets Align , have actual meaning. Compare Died on Their Birthday , where a character's birthdate also comes to signify the day one dies. May lead to an I Remember Because... . Can often overlap with Significant Reference Date , if the birthday is a reference to some real-world date, such as the date of their first appearance, the premiere/publication of some work within the franchise, the birthday of the person who inspired their creation, etc.
